name: agent-review
description: Review explicitly scoped code or selected Markdown content, including Markdown prompts and SKILL.md files.

interface.shortDescription: Review selected code and Markdown content
interface.longDescription: Review explicitly scoped code for correctness, security, maintainability, and test coverage, or selected Markdown content for correctness and clarity with additional prompt and skill checks, while redacting secrets and sensitive personal data from reports.
defaultPrompt: Use $review-code to review all uncommitted code changes in this repository.
Use $review-markdown to review the current README.md file in full.
